description_long: This is a modern, rectangular microwave oven with a matte black exterior and a large, transparent window on the front door. The control panel is located on the right side of the front face, featuring a vertical array of buttons and a digital display. The door handle is a prominent, vertical bar adjacent to the control panel, designed for easy gripping and pulling. The sides and back of the microwave are solid and unadorned, with no visible vents or additional features. The interior is visible through the front window, showing a turntable for even heating. The overall design is sleek and minimalistic, suitable for contemporary urban kitchens or break rooms.
description: A sleek, matte black microwave with a large front window, vertical control panel, and a prominent door handle. The design is modern and minimalistic, with a visible turntable inside.
description_view_0: Front view showing the transparent window, vertical control panel with buttons, and the door handle.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, solid black surface with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, flat black back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain, solid black surface, mirroring the left side.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is vertically aligned on the right side of the front face, featuring a column of rectangular buttons and a small digital display at the top. The buttons are clearly separated and labeled, likely for power, time, and preset functions.
attribute_door_handle_design: The door handle is a vertical bar located immediately to the left of the control panel, extending nearly the full height of the door. It appears to be made of plastic or metal, with a simple, straight design for easy gripping.
attribute_vent_placement: No visible vents or ventilation openings are present on any side of the microwave.
attribute_window_presence: A large, rectangular transparent window is present on the front door, occupying most of the door's surface and allowing a clear view of the interior.
